title: Keano Brown’s murder-accused back in court
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 30-year-old man charged with the murder of Keano Brown (23) on the evening of 6 July appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Tuesday 26 August.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 30-year-old man charged with the murder of Keano Brown (23) on the evening of 6 July appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Tuesday 26 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Brown was fatally stabbed in Cob Street, Ext 13, allegedly by Claytin Williams."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was rushed to hospital where he later died of his injuries. Williams was arrested later the same night.","html":"He was rushed to hospital where he later died of his injuries. Williams was arrested later the same night."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on 8 July, where the matter was postponed to 16 July for a formal bail application.","html":"He appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on 8 July, where the matter was postponed to 16 July for a formal bail application."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"However, he abandoned it instead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is set to appear in court again on 23 September.","html":"He is set to appear in court again on 23 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Keano Brown’s murder-accused back in court
